about.title: Miroslav Stibůrek
about.quote: True beauty and meaning lies in authenticity.
about.description: Born in Benešov, Czech Republic, Miroslav Stibůrek — also known as Miroslavo — is a contemporary artist, designer, and creative strategist. Best known for expressive abstract paintings, his work explores movement, form, colour, and emotion through a distinctive visual language. Paintings are held in private collections across Czechia, Spain, Mexico, England, and the United States.
about.description2: After living in Czechia and England, he settled in Barcelona in 2016, where painting remains at the centre of his practice. He has exhibited internationally — including a solo museum exhibition — and co-founded Miroslavo Art Gallery in 2024. Through colour, gesture, and playful symbolism, the work reflects themes of identity, aliveness, and the tension between structure and freedom.
about.portraitAlt: Miroslav Stibůrek — contemporary artist and designer
